title: arenaria umbellata
intro: Arenaria umbellata, also known as Sandwort, is a perennial herb that belongs to the Caryophyllaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, Sandwort is often used in the form of infusions, tinctures, or salves to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
